campaign.title: Real weeks, adaptive rhythm
campaign.strategy_summary: A 20-post Instagram learning cycle testing pain/friction, product mechanisms, belief differentiation, and early-adopter feedback while preserving product truth.

notes: Every planned visual asset has exactly one native GPT Image job.

posts.audience_tension: The audience wants habits to continue, but rigid streaks and perfect-day plans make normal life feel like failure.
posts.product_truth_anchor: Progress is visible daily and weekly evidence of continued habit construction against the user selected rhythm, not perfection.
posts.hook: Your streak broke. Your progress did not.
posts.caption: Your streak broke. Your progress did not. Real weeks need a habit system that can keep direction. Innerbloom is an early product for building habits with visible progress, selected rhythm, retrospective review, and monthly calibration. It does not promise perfect consistency or automatic fixes; it helps you see what happened and choose the next sustainable step.

cta.label: See how Innerbloom works
cta.intent: Move qualified Instagram visitors to the landing page or auth-start path for a reviewable early-product test.
cta.truthfulness_note: CTA invites exploration and account creation without implying guaranteed outcomes or weekly rhythm reselection.

posts.hypothesis: If this pain and friction message is clear, it will improve landing_cta_clicked per landing session for acquisition traffic.

jobs.visual_concept: Product-led editorial square with one dominant message and truthful proof when the registered screenshot supports the claim.

composition_spec.layout: Mobile-first square with large headline, one proof zone or abstract brand form, and small CTA footer.

jobs.generation_prompt: Create a polished final 1080x1080 Instagram static asset for Innerbloom. Exact visible copy: eyebrow 'Pain and friction', headline 'Your streak broke. Use registered source assets only as described: approved_logo_primary_png is approved_logo. jobs.generation_prompt: Create a polished final 1080x1080 Instagram carousel asset for Innerbloom. Exact visible copy: eyebrow 'Belief and differentiation · 3/4', headline 'How Innerbloom helps', supporting text 'The core promise is to see progress, adjust challenge, and build habits sustainably without shame or perfection pressure.', microcopy See how Innerbloom works. If logo only, create a brand-led no-screenshot composition with abstract rhythm/progress forms. Produce a distinctive premium campaign visual, not a generic SaaS template, with generous negative space, rounded cards, restrained glow, and exact copy legibility.
jobs.negative_prompt: Reject childish graphics, generic wellness pastels, generic SaaS templates, raw screenshots pasted in rectangles, fake UI, fake metrics, fake screens, fake testimonials, distorted screenshots, illegible copy, excessive glow, clutter, low resolution, medical or therapeutic claims, and recreated wordmarks when a logo source is provided.

must_preserve: Registered UI screenshots exactly when used
Approved logo proportions
Product truth: no automatic weekly or real-time adaptation claims

acceptance_criteria: Any screenshot directly supports the claim
No unavailable physical reference is used
